arts.ttl: Lazio and Monza vie for Casadei as Milan’s Interest wanes
arts.sum: Chelsea midfielder Cesare Casadei is at the center of transfer speculation as the January window approaches. The young Italian talent, who has struggled for playing time under Enzo Maresca's high-flying Chelsea side, is looking for an opportunity to gain more regular first-team action. arts.ttl: Patrik Schick’s four-goal masterclass reignites Juventus links
arts.sum: Patrik Schick delivered a stunning performance for Bayer Leverkusen, scoring four goals in their dominant 5-1 victory over Freiburg in the Bundesliga. The Czech striker's remarkable display has not only kept the reigning German champions within striking distance of league leaders Bayern Munich but has also reignited transfer speculation surrounding his future. arts.ttl: Monza vs. Juventus to get back to winning ways
arts.sum: Monza`s first victory in its history in Serie A came against Juventus, on 18 September 2022 at U-Power Stadium 1-0 with a goal scored by Christian Gytkjær. Monza have earned the fewest points in home games in Serie A this season: only three in eight matches at the U-Power Stadium (3D, 5L).
